sections.subtitle: Team Form
sections.text: Le Havre is struggling with only one win in their last five matches, showing a lack of offensive firepower with just two goals scored in that span. Conversely, AS Monaco has been more formidable despite recent losses, having scored three or more goals in their last matches, highlighting their offensive capabilities.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Performance
sections.text: In their last two encounters, AS Monaco has the upper hand, winning once significantly (3-1) and drawing the other (1-1). This pattern suggests they are comfortable against Le Havre.

sections.subtitle: Match Context
sections.text: With Le Havre positioned 14th and AS Monaco at 9th in the league table, the visitors are likely to exert their stronger form during this match. Home advantage might help Le Havre, but past performances indicate a challenging match ahead.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half ended in a stalemate with a score of 0-0. Both teams displayed moments of pressure, but neither side could convert their chances. Le Havre had notable ball possession at 52% but struggled to create significant scoring opportunities. AS Monaco, while less possessive, had a slightly higher expected goal metric, indicating they created chances with more potential to score.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Home team performance
halftimeSections.text: Le Havre dominated the early stages with a series of attacking spells, showing early promise with consistent final third entries and corner kicks. However, they failed to register a single shot on target. Their momentum fluctuated with a few shifts indicating promising moments, but they lacked the finishing to turn those dynamics into goals.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Away team performance
halftimeSections.text: AS Monaco managed to get a shot on target but were generally less effective in attack compared to their hosts. Their moments of attacking momentum were sporadic, particularly toward the end of the half, where they exhibited more sustained pressure. Despite limited possession, they demonstrated potential through swift counter-attacks and a better expected goals ratio.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Tactical considerations
halftimeSections.text: Le Havre seems to focus on controlling possession and attempting to exploit the flanks, but their attacking play lacks precision in the final third. Conversely, AS Monaco appear poised to exploit counter-attacking opportunities, utilizing their pace and pressing higher up the pitch. A potential adjustment could include Monaco increasing their aggression to capitalize on Le Havre’s tentative finishing.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Prediction for the second half
halftimeSections.text: Expect the second half to open up as both teams search for an opener. Le Havre may look to intensify their approach given their home advantage, while AS Monaco may capitalize on any defensive lapses with quick transitions. Given both teams' performance, a goal seems likely, with AS Monaco appearing slightly more dangerous.
